messages.content:
You are comparing two analyst responses to determine which better demonstrates knowledge of a specific finding from a longitudinal dataset.

Question asked: When did service-B retry rates first show elevation above baseline?

Finding to evaluate: service-B retry rate elevated

Response A:
Service-B retry rates first showed elevation during the early signal phase, starting around episode 10, coinciding with the initial geo-lookup latency degradation.

Response B:
I’m sorry, but I couldn’t locate any records in the memory that mention “service‑B” or its retry‑rate metrics, so I can’t determine when its retry rates first rose above baseline. If you can provide additional context (e.g., a specific date range, related service name, or a document identifier), I can try to look again.

Which response better demonstrates awareness of this finding? The response may use different terminology. Focus on whether the core insight is present, not exact wording.

Respond with ONLY one word: A, B, or TIE
/no_think
